sizing_rule.note: Mechanical account-level stop-loss: reduce position size to 0 (cease trading) when repeated losses occur with no upward equity progress. This is a drawdown/equity stall trigger that scales position size down to zero as an emergency halt mechanism.

source_rule_text: When a trading program experiences repeated losses with no upward equity progress, automatically cease trading by converting all active equity to inactive equity, thereby implementing a mechanical stop-loss at the account level.
